parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ data: [ { event_name:$json.event_name, event_time: Math.floor(Date.now()/1000), event_id:$json.event_id, action_source:'website', user_data:{ fbc:$json.fbc, fbp:$json.fbp }, custom_data: ($json.event_name==='Purchase' ? { value:$json.value, currency:'EUR' } : {}) } ] }) }}
